name: Oat Flake Garbanzo Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together: oat flour, brown rice flour, garbanzo flour, chopped nuts and/or raisins, baking powder, and sea salt (if using).
2. Mix the liquids separately: vegetable oil, honey or maple syrup, water or juice, and vanilla.
3. Combine the dry mixture with the wet mixture until well combined.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the dough onto an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
6. Allow to cool on the pan before removing.
